query:
INSERT INTO jobs
                (id, spooler_job_id, document_name, user_name, printer_name,
                 status, pages, size_bytes, created_at, updated_at)
               VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
               ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET
                 status = excluded.status,
                 updated_at = excluded.updated_at
